title: MBS-Lang Azure provider summary
evidence_boundary: Real provider behavior evidence only for the listed multilingual schema, seven cases, languages, deployment, json_mode, gate thresholds, and run settings. This is not broad multilingual reliability or translation-quality evidence.
raw_provider_outputs_reason: Raw provider JSONL remains in ignored local results paths unless separately scrubbed and intentionally released.

rows.interpretation: Seven-case multilingual provider gate passed for the listed deployment and settings. Repeat across more providers, OSS/HPC models, schemas, seeds, and languages before broad reliability claims.

non_claims: Does not claim universal multilingual model reliability.
Does not evaluate translation quality independently of the structured risk-review task.
Does not compare providers or OSS/HPC models.
Does not publish raw provider outputs.
